reviews.review_description: A game like this might have bad reviews but i can tell u its really good ive seen games and this one is fun i do recomend

Honestly i had good hopes for this games release, well ima be honest its not even worth getting, its just a paid unity project with a few things changed, the gameplay is very boring, all you do is hold a net over creatures and instantly get them. Id honestly like it better if the gameplay had something you had to do like ac fishing. You also said there would be trading but theres not and the “un equip” button is just a delete button which sucks cuz if i dont want 999 things following me i have to delete stuff, also dont even get me started on the shop. It is just a broken shop system with a few cubes. Overall this game just feels repetitive and boring. Not worth installing.
